system.description:
Creates a permanent Fettered Strength telepathic connection to another being. Forging the link takes 1d5 hours and requires a Difficult (–10) Focus Power Test. If successful, the link operates automatically at no effort within range. Only one Mental Bond may be maintained at a time. If the target dies, the bond dissolves and the psyker suffers 1d10 Insanity Points. Voluntarily breaking the bond requires a Hard (–20) Willpower Test.

Focus Power Test: Willpower

Prerequisites: Mind Link

XP Cost: 300
